deathcorpses:item-handbooktext-deathcorp:
Helps to find your corpse. Server admins can also check the server-main.txt log for the exact coordinates of all corpses (uses in Creative)

Searches in 7x7 chunks around player (224x256x224 blocks by default)
corpsecompass-no-accurate-reading: The corpse compass does not provide an accurate reading in this world
corpsecompass-target-set: Target set on the last corpse
deathcorpses:item-handbooktext-deathcorp: A mysterious death notice purchased from traders. Use it to bind to a random player's corpse somewhere in the world. Once bound, it becomes a unique tracker that points you in their general direction.

This obituary is bound to a specific player's corpse. Use it to sense the general direction toward that corpse. Each reading gives a slightly different hint. If the corpse is collected or destroyed, the obituary fades.
The corpse this obituary once tracked is gone. All that remains is a faded memory of the fallen.
obituaries-no-corpses: The ink remains still — no souls have departed in this world
obituaries-hint: The obituary whispers of {0}'s demise... you sense a pull in their direction
obituaries-distant: The spirits stir but the path to {0}'s remains is shrouded in fog... venture closer
obituaries-trail-cold: The trail to {0}'s corpse has gone cold... the ink fades before your eyes
